title: LLM text data is drying up, but Meta points to unlabeled video as the next massive training frontier
what_happened: A research team from Meta FAIR and New York University trained a multimodal AI model from scratch and found that several common assumptions about how these models should be built don't hold up. The article LLM text data is drying up, but Meta points to unlabeled video as the next massive training frontier appeared first on The Decoder.
primary_risk: Unclear production readiness despite promising early results.
primary_opportunity: Foundation for future optimization rather than immediate disruption.
technical_angle: Reinforces known techniques with modest refinements to existing methods.

title: Luma AI's new Uni-1 image model tops Nano Banana 2 and GPT Image 1.5 on logic-based benchmarks
what_happened: Luma AI takes on OpenAI and Google with Uni-1, a model that combines image understanding and generation in a single architecture and reasons through prompts as it creates. The article Luma AI's new Uni-1 image model tops Nano Banana 2 and GPT Image 1.5 on logic-based benchmarks appeared first on The Decoder.
primary_risk: Risk of overfitting conclusions to narrow benchmarks.
primary_opportunity: Selective adoption in niche use cases with clear ROI.
technical_angle: Adds empirical validation to approaches already used in production AI stacks.

title: Omni-C: Compressing Heterogeneous Modalities into a Single Dense Encoder
what_happened: arXiv:2603.05528v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Recent multimodal systems often rely on separate expert modality encoders which cause linearly scaling complexity and computational overhead with added modalities. primary_opportunity: Foundation for future optimization rather than immediate disruption.

title: Hallucinated references are passing peer review at top AI conferences and a new open tool wants to fix that
what_happened: Fake citations are slipping past peer review at top AI conferences, and commercial LLMs can't spot the fakes they generate. A new open-source tool called CiteAudit allegedly catches what GPT, Gemini, and Claude miss. The article Hallucinated references are passing peer review at top AI conferences and a new open tool wants to fix that appeared firs
primary_risk: Marginal performance gains may not justify integration effort.
primary_opportunity: Practical improvements when layered onto existing AI workflows.
technical_angle: Reinforces known techniques with modest refinements to existing methods.

title: OpenAI's hardware and robotics chief quits over military deal she says lacked enough deliberation
what_happened: OpenAI's head of robotics, Caitlin Kalinowski, is leaving the company over its Pentagon deal, citing concerns about mass surveillance and lethal autonomy. The article OpenAI's hardware and robotics chief quits over military deal she says lacked enough deliberation appeared first on The Decoder.
primary_risk: Regulatory exposure and erosion of public trust due to opaque data practices.
primary_opportunity: Differentiation through auditable, privacy-preserving AI pipelines.
technical_angle: Trust, not model size, is becoming a core technical constraint in AI systems.
